prompt: Create a cinematic 16:9 anime fantasy portrait of a tall, slender mage facing forward in a powerful symmetrical pose. The character wears a white lacquer fox-like half mask with two tall horn-shaped ears, orange-red ritual markings, narrow eye slits, and one glowing circular sigil centered on the forehead. Long wild black hair streams dramatically outward behind the head, with two thin front braids tied with small red tassels. The mage is dressed in pale layered robes and a voluminous cream-white feathered or fur-like mantle with soft textured tufts, arms extending outward beyond the frame. Use a vibrant neon-accented palette: warm ivory robes, deep blue-black hair, orange flame-like glow, and a flat teal-blue sky background. Add a few floating ember sparks and partial orange flame shapes near the upper right edge and mask tips. Style it as high-end painterly anime concept art with rough ink lines, visible grain, expressive brush texture, dramatic backlit rim lighting, calm mysterious expression, centered composition, no text, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a cinematic 16:9 anime fantasy portrait of a tall, slender mage facing forward in a powerful symmetrical pose. The character wears a white lacquer fox-like half mask with two tall horn-shaped ears, orange-red ritual markings, narrow eye slits, and one glowing circular sigil centered on the forehead. Long wild black hair streams dramatically outward behind the head, with two thin front braids tied with small red tassels. The mage is dressed in pale layered robes and a voluminous cream-white feathered or fur-like mantle with soft textured tufts, arms extending outward beyond the frame. Use a vibrant neon-accented palette: warm ivory robes, deep blue-black hair, orange flame-like glow, and a flat teal-blue sky background. Add a few floating ember sparks and partial orange flame shapes near the upper right edge and mask tips. Style it as high-end painterly anime concept art with rough ink lines, visible grain, expressive brush texture, dramatic backlit rim lighting, calm mysterious expression, centered composition, no text, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张 16:9 的电影级动漫奇幻肖像，描绘一位高挑纤细的法师正面向前，呈现出充满力量的对称姿态。角色佩戴着白色漆面狐狸半脸面具，面具上有两只高耸的角状耳朵、橙红色仪式印记、狭长的眼缝，额头中央有一个发光的圆形符文。长而狂野的黑发在脑后戏剧性地向外飘散，两根细细的前额发辫系着红色小流苏。法师身着浅色叠层长袍，披着一件蓬松的奶油白色羽毛或毛皮质感的斗篷，双臂向外延伸至画框之外。使用充满活力的霓虹色调：暖象牙色长袍、深蓝黑色头发、橙色火焰般的光芒，以及平坦的青蓝色天空背景。在右上边缘和面具尖端附近添加一些漂浮的余烬火花和部分橙色火焰形状。风格设定为高端手绘动漫概念艺术，带有粗犷的墨线、可见的颗粒感、富有表现力的笔触纹理、戏剧性的背光轮廓照明、冷静神秘的表情、居中构图，无文字，无水印。
